title: Three-Bedroom Seminyak Pool Villa with Garden Gazebo
blurb: A three-bedroom villa over two floors in central Seminyak — full-height glass framing pool or garden views from every room, an 11-metre pool ringed by daybeds and a shaded gazebo, yoga mats on the deck, and daily breakfast, a short walk from Petitenget's golden sand.
detail:
This 557 m² villa unfolds over two floors around a private pool and garden. The ground level gathers the indoor dining room, an air-conditioned living area, and an outdoor lounge with ceiling fans, plus a yoga bale, one bedroom, and a covered sitting spot by the water. Two more bedrooms, including the master, sit upstairs. All three rooms are en-suite with king beds, ample wardrobe space, blackout curtains, and full-height glass that opens each morning onto the pool or the greenery.

The 11-metre pool is the heart of the garden, fringed by four loungers, daybeds, and a restful gazebo for shaded afternoons. Four yoga mats and a massage bed are on hand for the pool deck, and in-villa treatments can be arranged. The indoor living room is fitted with a smart TV, streaming, and a sound system, with books and board games for quieter hours, while the kitchen and dining area handle everything up to a table for eight.

Daily breakfast is served poolside on request, and a private chef can be enlisted to cook throughout the stay. A team of attendants provides daily housekeeping and looks after the details. The setting is thoroughly central: steps from Seminyak's best-known dining and beach clubs, yet a short, easy walk to the golden sand of Petitenget Beach, a favourite among surfers.

features.l: Pool or garden views in every room
